hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'lib/storage/.*\.ts$'; then echo '⚠️  Storage layer changed — run /check-migration-ready before committing.'; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'app/.*\.(tsx|ts)$'; then echo '💡 Route file changed — verify against tech-spec route map (§2.2).'; fi

PROMPT="$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT"; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE '(deploy|production|release|ship)'; then echo '🚀 PRE-DEPLOY CHECKLIST: 1) /audit-spec  2) /check-migration-ready  3) typecheck+lint  4) lighthouse mobile  5) all 18 routes work  6) localStorage 7-key inventory intact'; fi
if [ -d "app" ] && git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null; then :; else echo '📋 Reminder: run /audit-spec before commit if you changed module code.'; fi
